test-method.name: CreateJobAPITest
test-method.description: Verify if create job api is able to create Inwarranty job

param.value: CreateJobPayload[mst_service_location_id=1, mst_platform_id=2, mst_warrenty_status_id=1, mst_oem_id=1, customer=Customer[first_name=Kajal, last_name=Halvorson, mobile_number=308-982-2512, mobile_number_alt=, email_id=Layne.Turcotte@yahoo.com, email_id_alt=], customer_address=CustomerAddress[flat_number=c 304, apartment_name=Jupiter, street_name=MG road, landmark=Bangur Nagar, area=Goregaon West, pincode=411039, country=India, state=Maharashtra], customer_product=CustomerProduct[dop=2025-04-06, serial_number=28391087191266, imei1=28391087191266, imei2=28391087191266, popurl=2025-04-06T18:30:00.000Z, product_id=1, mst_model_id=1], problems=[Problems[id=1, remark=Battery Issue]]]
